title: Middle Eastern Tagine with Fresh Tomatoes
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Morocco, made with fresh tomatoes, fluffy rice, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add fresh tomatoes, middle eastern olives, and tagine spice blend. Stir to combine.
Add fluffy rice and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add lemon juice and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
